key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: Three-year average OCF $1098.909M ÷ 118.607M shares; FY2025 OCF $1282.267M and capex $589.801M per ALB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260211_rpt20251231_acc0000915913_26_000018.htm
Mid-cycle lithium normalization; modest deleveraging from OCF; exit 9× owner cash

open_questions: Confirm mid-cycle owner-cash normalization (three-year average OCF vs FY2025 alone).
Conversion milestone band (**$0–$40/sh**) pending project-level disclosure.
Management capital allocation through lithium cycle (equity raises, capex cuts).
Live price confirmation and final base IRR after mechanical refresh.
thesis: Albemarle Corporation is a global specialty chemicals company and the largest Western lithium producer, operating lithium conversion (Energy Storage), bromine and related specialties, and refining catalysts (Ketjen). **[Fact]** Shares trade on the NYSE (ALB). **[Fact]** FY2025 consolidated net sales were **$5.14 billion**, operating loss **$367 million**, and net loss **$511 million** (diluted loss **$5.76** per share) per `investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260211_rpt20251231_acc0000915913_26_000018.htm`. **[Fact]** FY2025 cash from operations was **$1.28 billion** while capital spending was **$590 million**, and Q1 2026 cash was **$1.09 billion** against total debt of **$1.88 billion** per `investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260506_rpt20260331_acc0000915913_26_000072.htm`.
why_market_wrong: The stock may trade as a pure lithium cycle bet, while bromine and specialty cash flows still support positive operating cash flow through the trough. **[Inference]** FY2025 operating loss narrowed to **$367 million** from **$1.78 billion** in FY2024, so generalists may extrapolate perpetual losses without crediting **$1.28 billion** of operating cash flow and Q1 2026 net income of **$319 million**. **[Inference]** Conversion assets and resource rights are carried at depreciated cost; the market may overweight GAAP net loss versus three-year average operating cash flow per share near **$9.27**. **[Inference]** Proof-first component math at base case sums to about **$18.75** per share of filing-locked economic value versus a price near **$118**, suggesting the market prices lithium price recovery and conversion ramp beyond what the conservative component schedule captures today.
